title: deutzia × maliflora
intro: Deutzia × maliflora, also known as the Deutzia-rose hybrid, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Deutzia × maliflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Deutzia × maliflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
